# WakilBhai

> Legal documentation service and lawyer connect for India — "Legal Work. Without Tension." Free, plain-language guides to common legal problems, ready-to-use document formats, and advocate help on WhatsApp. WakilBhai is a documentation service with advocate partners, not a law firm; nothing here is legal advice.

## How it works (the funnel)

- **Free guides & tools** — step-by-step help for everyday legal problems (cheque bounce, rent, salary, consumer complaints), with real deadlines and costs.
- **Free WhatsApp lawyer** — a 10-minute consult on WhatsApp: https://wa.me/917686022245
- **Documents from ₹199** — notices, agreements and affidavits drafted and delivered in 1–3 working days (₹199–₹999).
- **Advocate consult / case handling** — paid advocate help for complex matters.

Content is available in English, Hindi, Bengali, Urdu, Marathi, Telugu, Tamil and Gujarati. English lives at the root; other locales use a `/{locale}/` prefix (e.g. `/hi/...`). Guides are fully translated in English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu; Marathi, Telugu, Tamil and Gujarati are rolling out.

## Best guides

- [Cheque bounced? What to do](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/money-recovery/cheque-bounce-what-to-do): The Section 138 process — send a demand notice within 30 days of the bank's return memo, the issuer gets 15 days to pay, then a criminal complaint within 30 days.
- [Unpaid salary — what to do](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/job-salary/unpaid-salary-what-to-do): Recovering unpaid salary or full-and-final dues — demand letter, labour authorities, and the legal routes for different kinds of employees.
- [Security deposit not returned](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/security-deposit-not-returned): What to do when a landlord won't return your deposit after you vacate — demand letter, timelines, and small-cause/consumer options.
- [How to make a rent agreement](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/rent-agreement-guide): Writing the terms, stamp paper and registration, and why the 11-month format is standard — with the costs involved.
- [Consumer forum complaint guide](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/consumer-complaints/consumer-forum-complaint-guide): Filing a consumer complaint — written complaint/legal notice first, then e-Daakhil, the forum tiers, and the compensation you can claim.

- [RTI application format](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/rti-application-format)
- [General affidavit format](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/general-affidavit-format)
